## What's wrong

<!-- Pick all that apply, delete the rest:
     - Won't add: the feed is rejected or discovery finds nothing
     - Missing articles: items in the source feed don't show up
     - Wrong/garbled content: title, body, image, or links render incorrectly
     - No summary: the AI summary card never appears
     - Wrong dedup: the "Also in N feeds" grouping is incorrect -->
